description: MindAI is an enterprise-grade, AI-powered mental health platform. It combines clinical psychological frameworks (PHQ-9) with machine learning (Scikit-learn) to predict burnout and provide personalized behavioral interventions. Built with a scalable microservices architecture using Django, PostgreSQL, and React.
A Prescriptive and Explainable Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for Type 2 Diabetes Risk Prediction and Personalized Counterfactual Recommendations
Universal machine learning framework for lithium-sulfur battery electrolyte solvation dynamics with experimental validation via Raman and PFG-NMR spectroscopy

A comprehensive machine learning operations (MLOps) framework for predicting customer churn in the telecommunications industry. This project demonstrates end-to-end ML pipeline development including data preprocessing, model training, hyperparameter optimization, drift detection, and deployment with an interactive web interface.

Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.
This project is my hands-on portfolio to deepen understanding of machine learning and deep learning pipelines.

An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

KNN-based machine learning framework for classification and recognition of motion sensor time-series data from wearable sensors, enabling efficient and interpretable motion pattern identification for smart sensing and humanmachine interface applications.
A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning
A curated list of awesome AML attacks and defences frameworks and resources.

Framework for aligning longitudinal Parkinsons Progression Markers Initiative (PPMI) data with the Parkinsons Disease Ontology (PDON) and Movement Disorder Ontology (PMDO). Provides reproducible mapping, ontology instantiation, and ontology-informed machine learning workflows for analysing Parkinsons disease trajectories.
Adaptive Data-Driven Framework for Auto-Scaling ModelLens, leveraging Real-Time Data and Distributed Data Preprocessing Pipelines as a Scalable Machine-Learning-Platform.
ADVANCED AI POWER XAUUSD trading framework with machine learning, real time analysis, multi broker integration, and intelligent trade execution
Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.

It utilizes advanced machine learning and data visualization techniques to analyze  engagement metrics like likes, comments, shares, and impressions to optimize content strategies.Developed expertise in applying machine learning to real-world social media  data, creating insightful visualizations, and building a robust predictive framework.
An MLOps framework to package, deploy, monitor and manage thousands of production machine learning models
A curated list of awesome agentic machine learning projects, frameworks, and resources.
Machine learning framework for student performance prediction with explainable AI and trustworthy visual analytics. DAS7000 PORT1.

A curated list of awesome frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources for Artificial Intelligence (AI). This list covers everything from foundational machine learning and deep learning to specialized areas like NLP, computer vision, and AI ethics.
This is a machine learning framework for predicting compressive strength of carbon foams using ensemble regression (Random Forest + XGBoost) with interactive Streamlit deployment.

Kmeans-NN method for Individual Load Forecasting and online fault detection in smart meters, following the article: Tayseer, M., Talaat, M., Zamel, A.A. et al. "Cyber-resilient machine learning framework for accurate individual load forecasting and anomaly detection in smart grids", Nature, December 2025.

Atlas DataFlow  um framework contrato-driven para construo de pipelines analticos modulares, auditveis e adaptveis. Organiza o fluxo de dados em etapas orientadas a domnio, promovendo rastreabilidade, reprodutibilidade e integrao consistente entre anlise de dados, modelagem estatstica e aplicaes de machine learning.
A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software. With repository stars and forks

This project implements a comprehensive anomaly detection system that addresses the critical challenge of data contamination in training sets. By integrating multiple advanced machine learning components, the framework achieves robust and reliable detection of anomalies in complex multivariate time-series data.
Folax (Finite Operator Learning with JAX) is a framework for solving and optimizing PDEs by integrating machine learning with numerical methods in computational mechanics.
Deep Reinforcement Learning framework for multi-machine production scheduling with A3C and DQN algorithms
An open-source machine learning framework for global analyses of parton distributions.
Qurating is a system that helps evaluate and score datasets based on their quality. It is inspired by the QuRating framework and focuses on selecting better data for machine learning tasks.
This repository contains the implementation of the hybrid machine-learning framework (unsupervised+supervised) used in our work on hydrogen storage prediction in materials.
High-Performance, Machine-Learning-Driven KeyForge Architecture Leverages Scalable, Intelligent, Distributed Systems for Real-Time Data Processing and Analytics Framework.
This is a set of simple machine learning model implementations to deepen my understanding of the mathematics and how frameworks would implement these.

An analytical implementation of Unsupervised Machine Learning to identify customer personas. This framework utilizes K-Means clustering and feature scaling to segment users based on behavioral data, optimized through WCSS and Elbow Method heuristics.
Predicting mental health treatment-seeking behavior in the tech industry using the CRISP-DM framework and machine learning classification models.

Fully automated and interpretable framework for motion phenotype classification from high-speed microscopy videos. Provides reproducible feature extraction and hierarchical machine learning tools for biomedical video analysis.
Explainable Machine Learning and GIS framework for modelling and mapping transboundary air pollution influence across countries (20162024).
Interpretable, generalized machine-learning framework for cross-site classification of autism using resting-state fMRI data

This project provides a robust machine learning framework to predict hourly bike-sharing demand in Washington, D.C.. It features advanced preprocessing, including pandemic data removal, and complex feature engineering. The repository includes the full Python notebook, an academic paper, and a presentation deck.
Recreation of a python ml framework without any ai libraries in order to better understand the methods behind machine learning

An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations
A research-driven Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for detecting fraudulent job postings using multi-source fraud signal fusion and explainable classification.
A hands-on laboratory repository for practicing Machine Learning & Deep Learning concepts using Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, and popular ML/DL frameworks.

A phishing detection framework that utilizes machine learning, adversarial training, and multi-modal feature extraction. It analyzes various data sources, including URLs, HTML, metadata, and user behavior, while leveraging GAN-generated samples to protect against adversarial attacks.
Machine Learning with the Circumpunct Framework
A quantitative analysis project predicting multi-day stock prices (1 to 5 days ahead) using statistical time-series models and machine learning.
Hybrid Machine Learning and Deep Learning framework for early multi-disease screening in smart healthcare ecosystems.
A machine learning framework to predict loan default risk using alternative borrower data, designed for underserved financial segments.
A comprehensive framework for evaluating the ethical implications of machine learning models, focusing on fairness, explainability, and accountability.

B.Tech CSE student specializing in Machine Learning, AI, and Networking. Passionate about building intelligent systems, network topologies, and automation solutions using Python, Cisco Packet Tracer, and modern ML frameworks.

Framework  for comprehensive variant detection in whole genome sequences using advanced machine learning models for cross domain pattern recognition in fitness, pharmacogenetics and nutritional aspects of sprint running
Personalized, AI-driven financial wellness engines leveraging encrypted data vaults machine learning workflows within a resilient, distributed ecosystem framework.
A performant and dynamic MachineLearning framework written in .NET
A machine learning framework for predicting agriculture terrace suitability using positive and unlabelled datasets: an application for the Troodos Mountains, Cyprus
Develop an AI framework that autonomously evolves trading strategies, models, and market predictions using self-reinforcing machine learning algorithms and real-time data integration.
Build and deploy machine learning models with Pontos, an efficient framework that simplifies workflows using Python, PyTorch, and Docker.
Governed dataset lifecycle reference implementation for AI training systems, compatible with the Access-PoD governance framework and Q-Pathformer multi-state machine learning architecture.
Algorithmic Trading in Python with Machine Learning

A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

A comprehensive machine learning governance framework (Master's Thesis) designed to monitor the intersection of data drift, Explainable AI (SHAP/LIME), and algorithmic fairness over time in financial risk models.

The **KC-ML framework** integrates biological priors (pathway enrichment and protein-protein interactions) as soft constraints into multi-model machine learning to improve feature stability and cross-cohort generalizability in transcriptomic prediction.
Data-Driven Framework Using Advanced Analytics & Machine Learning for Gaming Trend Analysis and Player Performance Prediction
Production-ready machine learning pipeline framework with automated feature engineering and experiment tracking.
An orchestration framework for End-to-End Machine Learning Serving with Resource Optimization on Heterogeneous Edge

An explainable hybrid phishing detection framework combining BERT-based transformers with machine learning models to detect phishing emails and malicious URLs. It leverages deep contextual text features and interpretable ML techniques to achieve high accuracy and transparent predictions for real-world cybersecurity use.
Go bindings to Apple's CoreML framework for high-performance machine learning inference on Apple Silicon.
An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.
An inference server for your machine learning models, including support for multiple frameworks, multi-model serving and more

AI-Image-Detection is a machine learning project that identifies and classifies images using deep learning techniques. It supports training, testing, and real-time prediction with high accuracy. Built with Python and modern AI frameworks, it provides a scalable solution for automated image analysis and intelligent visual recognition applications.
Interpretable machine-learning framework for chronic disease risk prediction using BRFSS survey data (20112015), with reproducible pipelines and Streamlit deployment.

This repository contains a full-stack web application designed for Face Recognition. It is built using **React** for the user interface, **Django REST Framework** for the backend API, and **OpenCV** + **Machine Learning** models for the core face recognition capabilities.

LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing  powered by big data and machine learning.
Machine Learning framework for training pixel track High-Purity online selection models for the Phase-2 High Level Trigger (HLT)
A comprehensive framework for detecting and assessing bias in machine learning models, designed for research and educational purposes.

A modular computational research framework for building, evaluating, and analysing advanced machine learning models in healthcare and cognitive decision-making domains. Includes explainability, uncertainty analysis, and reproducible experimental pipelines.

PyCluster is a Windows-optimized distributed computing framework built on Dask that simplifies cluster orchestration, task parallelism, and AI workload management.  It provides a head nodeworker architecture with real-time dashboard monitoring, REST API integration, and optional GPU awareness for machine learning and lLLM workloads.

This project presents a hybrid deep learning framework for detecting AI-generated (deepfake) tweets using stylometric feature analysis and machine learning models, combined with Explainable AI techniques to ensure transparency and interpretability.  This system classifies tweets as:   Human-written   AI-generated
Machine learning framework for aging analysis in Drosophila single-cell RNA-seq   data. Deep learning models with SHAP interpretability, batch correction, and   comprehensive research workflows.

This repository explores Machine Learning through projects, scripts, and tutorials. It covers data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, and deployment using frameworks like scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, with applications in classification, regression, NLP, and computer vision.
Machine learning framework for the detection and mapping of potential natural hydrogen reservoirs in Atyrau, Kazakhstan.
A Machine Learning Based Framework for City-Wise Crime Analysis and Forecasting using monthly aggregated time-series data.

Supply chain delays cause major financial losses. This project uses machine learning to identify high-risk routes, giving operators a targeted, data-driven framework to strategically invest in IoT infrastructure, reduce delays, and protect profits.
A comprehensive ranking and evaluation framework for machine learning models and algorithms
End-to-end data science and machine learning projects following the CRISP-DM framework: business understanding, data preparation, modeling, evaluation, and deployment-ready workflows.
Oblivious ML-Ops (OMLO), a framework for privacy-preserving machine learning infrastructure that enables training and serving of ML models while hiding data-dependent access patterns.
A flexible and performant framework for training machine learning potentials.

FedEasy is an intuitive powerful yet simple to use Federated Learning framework. Our goal is to streamline the process of setting up and running federated learning experiments with ease, making advanced machine learning techniques accessible to researchers and developers alike.

Framework de Rede Definida por Software (SDN) com monitoramento inteligente via Machine Learning (Isolation Forest). Automatizao de fluxos OpenFlow para deteco de anomalias e reduo de custos em infraestruturas de TIC utilizando Ryu Controller e Mininet.

An AI-based behavioural analytics system that detects and predicts impulsive spending patterns in young adults using transaction data, machine learning models, and a composite risk scoring framework, supported by personalized financial nudges for proactive financial wellness.
A machine learning framework for centromere-aware evaluation of human genome assemblies
A Hybrid Deep Learning and Unsupervised Machine Learning Framework for Smart Energy Grid Monitoring.

SparseBank is a machine-learningassisted framework for reducing matched-filter template banks. By learning the object masses it allows to significantly reduce the CBC templates that preserve detection sensitivity while significantly lowering computational cost.
Ignite your local AI projects with Ignis, a tool designed for seamless implementation and efficient management of machine learning models.
This project develops and evaluates a predictive framework for forecasting next-day NIFTY 50 index direction using technical indicators and machine learning models.
This project develops a predictive framework for credit risk under IFRS 9 standards. It leverages a dataset of over 32,500 entries to predict the Probability of Default (PD).
A hybrid NLP and machine learning framework for automated disease diagnosis using patient symptom data with feature extraction, feature fusion, and classification models.
Open Machine Learning Framework in CPP

This framework integrates large-scale NMME data and multi-platform observations to advance seasonal monsoon forecasting. This framework is developed using super-ensemble machine learning models to downscale, bias-correct, and generalize global forecasts into high-resolution regional climate intelligence for precipitation and temperature
An advanced web-based data platform using Python frameworks that integrates multiple data sources and applies machine learning for predictive analytics.

Developed a Diabetic Prediction System using Machine Learning with Pandas and NumPy for data preprocessing and analysis. Implemented and compared KNN, Decision Tree, and MLP classifiers, improving accuracy through model evaluation and hyperparameter tuning.and Django backend framework
